name: Ricercar
description: The orchestra painting itself (Ricercar.3 — per-section mark engine, D-176). Each orchestral SECTION has a distinct painterly identity (colour + weight + texture + material); the painting builds in sync with the music (identity first, sync second). Spirit of Fantasia, elegant + luminous on a LIGHT canvas — the elegant/luminous sibling of Skein, built on Skein's canvas-hold marks-on-top engine (graceful composed strokes, not Pollock drip). Ricercar.3 shows 3 of the 5 sections (basses/violas/flutes), hand-fed; the full five + audio sync are Ricercar.4/.5. See docs/presets/RICERCAR_DESIGN.md §CONCEPT.
author: Matt
